a_image.alt: Glassmorphism style mood board — UI Effect · Frosted Glass

sections.a_eyebrow: Glassmorphic · Frosted Glass · Transparent · Layered · Modern
sections.a_description: Frosted glass panels that seem to float over vivid color gradients — translucent, layered, and luminous. Popularized by Apple's iOS design language, glassmorphism makes interfaces feel like tangible sheets of frosted material with soft edges and gentle depth, where light passes through semi-transparent surfaces and color bleeds softly from behind.

You'll find glassmorphism on modern fintech dashboards, weather apps, and portfolio sites that want a premium, polished feel. It's a go-to for landing pages that need to feel contemporary without being heavy — music players, productivity tools, and crypto platforms often reach for this translucent, layered look.

Frosted glass panel hovering over vivid color blobs on a deep purple-to-indigo gradient (#4a00e0 → #8e2de2). Two large blurred circles create the color show behind the glass — a ::before blob in hot pink (#ff6ec7), 350px, positioned bottom-left, and a ::after blob in cyan (#00d4ff), 300px, positioned upper-right — both at ~40% opacity so their color bleeds dramatically through the frosted panel. The .inner panel is the frosted glass itself: margin 24px to float inset from the edges (exposing the colorful background around it), rgba(255,255,255,0.1) background, backdrop-filter: blur(24px), a luminous 1px border in rgba(255,255,255,0.2), border-radius 20px, and layered box-shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15)) for depth and a top-edge highlight. Text is white and near-white. Rounded corners everywhere (20px on inner, 50px pill-shaped buttons). Soft, modern, iOS-inspired. Set in Quicksand — a rounded geometric sans-serif whose soft terminals mirror the frosted, rounded feel of the glass panels. Heading at weight 700, 30px, −0.5px letter-spacing, line-height 1.2, white. Eyebrow at weight 500, 12px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, rgba(255,255,255,0.6). Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, rgba(255,255,255,0.8). Buttons at weight 600, uppercase, 1px letter-spacing. Primary: solid accent background (#8e2de2) with white text, hover lightens and adds a purple glow box-shadow — this button pops against the frosted glass. Secondary: transparent with 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.3) border, white text, hover gains a subtle frosted fill. Alternatives: Nunito (similar rounded terminals), Poppins (geometric but slightly wider), Varela Round (softer single-story a).
